extension.description: Fast, searchable Salesforce Apex logs in VS Code — browse, filter, tail, and debug with Apex Replay.
salesforce.panel.title: Electivus Apex Logs
salesforce.tail.panel.title: Electivus Apex Logs Tail
salesforce.logs.view.name: Electivus Apex Logs
salesforce.tail.view.name: Electivus Apex Logs Tail
command.refresh.title: Refresh Logs
command.selectOrg.title: Select Org
command.tail.title: Tail Logs
command.openLogsEditor.title: Open Logs in Editor Area
command.openTailEditor.title: Open Tail in Editor Area
command.openLogInViewer.title: Open in Apex Log Viewer
command.copyDiagnostics.title: Copy Diagnostics Package
configuration.title: Electivus Apex Logs
configuration.electivus.apexLogViewer.lo: Number of logs to fetch per page (effective maximum: 200). Higher values fetch more per request but may slow the UI or increase API load.
Maximum concurrent requests to fetch log headers. Very high values may overload Salesforce APIs or hit rate limits.
configuration.electivus.apexLogViewer.ta: Lines kept in the Tail view's rolling buffer. Larger buffers use more memory and CPU.
configuration.electivus.apexLogViewer.lo: Enable verbose extension and shared-core trace logging in the Electivus Apex Log Viewer output channel.
Persisted column layout for the Logs table (managed by the Logs panel UI). Stores visibility/order/widths in user settings so it survives reloads and can sync across machines.
tailSaveFailed: Tail: failed to save log to workspace (best-effort).
openLogInViewer.noDocument: Electivus Apex Logs: No Apex log is active.
openLogInViewer.unsupportedScheme: Electivus Apex Logs: Unable to open Apex logs from this location.
openLogInViewer.notApex: Electivus Apex Logs: The active document is not recognized as a Salesforce Apex log.
debugFlags.panel.title: Apex Debug Flags
debugFlags.unavailable: Debug Flags panel is unavailable before extension activation.
debugFlags.loadOrgsFailed: Failed to load org and debug level data: {0}
debugFlags.loadStatusFailed: Failed to load debug flag status for the selected target: {0}
debugFlags.removeNone: No active USER_DEBUG trace flag was found for this target.
debugFlags.targetUnavailable: The trace flag target "{0}" is not available in this org.
logsCleanup.alreadyRunning: A log cleanup is already in progress.
logsCleanup.confirmMine.title: Delete your Apex logs for the selected org?
logsCleanup.confirmMine.detail: This permanently deletes ApexLog records whose LogUser matches the currently authenticated org user. It can't be undone.
logsCleanup.confirmAll.title: Delete all Apex logs for the selected org?
logsCleanup.confirmAll.detail: This permanently deletes ApexLog records stored in the org. It can't be undone.
logsCleanup.progressListingAll: Listing Apex logs in the org…
logsCleanup.emptyMine: No Apex logs were found for the authenticated user.
logsCleanup.emptyAll: No Apex logs were found in the org.
logsCleanup.hintStorageFull: Org log storage appears to be full. Use “Clear logs” → “All org logs” to free up space.
diagnostics.copied: Electivus Apex Logs: diagnostics package copied to clipboard.
diagnostics.copyFailed: Electivus Apex Logs: failed to copy diagnostics: {0}
